hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push' && ! echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '(-C|--git-dir)'; then cd /opt/chronicle && for sub in chronicle-api chronicle-server chronicle-web chronicle rhizome rhizome-client; do if [ -d "$sub/.git" ] || [ -f "$sub/.git" ]; then sha=$(git ls-tree HEAD "$sub" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $3}'); if [ -n "$sha" ] && ! git -C "$sub" branch -r --contains "$sha" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "BLOCK: Submodule '$sub' has unpushed commit ${sha:0:8}. Push submodule branches before pushing the main repo." >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; done; fi; exit 0

needs_compile=false; for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in *.kt|*.java) needs_compile=true; break;; esac; done; if $needs_compile; then cd /opt/chronicle && ./gradlew :chronicle-server:compileKotlin :chronicle-api:compileKotlin --no-daemon -q 2>&1 | tail -15; fi; exit 0
